title: Sunlight Song Lyrics from Pon Ondru Kanden

udane sollu edhunaalum possible
pesalaam pazhagalaam Friday to Thingal

adadaa adhula ennada irukuthu fun

unnamattumthaan panren anbu

kanmuney littaa vandhaa

lovuku venum rendu manasu

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Sunlight?

The song Sunlight conveys themes of joy, love, and a carefree lifestyle, celebrating the beauty of simple moments.

What is the context of Sunlight in the movie Pon Ondru Kanden?

In Pon Ondru Kanden, Sunlight reflects the protagonist's cheerful outlook on life and relationships.

Who is the singer and music director of Sunlight?

The song is sung and composed by Yuvan, showcasing his unique musical style.

When was Sunlight released?

Sunlight was released on April 26, 2024.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Sunlight from the upcoming movie Pon Ondru Kanden radiates positivity and joy. It captures the essence of living life to the fullest, with lyrics that celebrate love and friendship. The upbeat melody, combined with Yuvan's engaging vocals, evokes feelings of happiness and excitement. This track is perfect for any celebration, making it a must-listen for fans of Tamil music.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Sunlight is a vibrant and catchy track that perfectly encapsulates the joy of life and love. With Yuvan's signature style and engaging lyrics by Durai, this song is set to become a favorite among fans. Experience the uplifting vibes of Sunlight from the much-anticipated movie Pon Ondru Kanden!
stanzaMeanings: Sunlight hits my eyes, for breakfast I only eat fruits. I'm going to the city, just a little fun, my girlfriends give me a boost.
What do they propose? Celebrities are close to me. I’ll give a pose for the paparazzi, whatever I do becomes news.
Sometimes I feel sad being single, but I always live a humble lifestyle. There’s nothing special, just a simple weakness for beautiful girls.
Let’s see what happens next week. I won’t be reachable. Just tell me if it’s possible to talk, from Friday to Monday.
No doubt, babe, even if the beauties are perfect, I have a crush on their friends. I know in our culture, there’s always fun in that.
I just follow my template dialogue. Love, what are you doing? If I say I’m bored, just give me a hint. It would be nice if you come and say hello at home.
On Friday night, I have a heavy trip planned. If I come, I’ll just wave my hand. I’ll be in the company of my friends.
If I see you, I’ll get a chance to meet. If I was a friend, I would have gone through all that.
For love, you need two hearts. I have many in that stage. What to do? Until I get young, I’ll just relax.
No doubt, babe, even if the beauties are perfect, I have a crush on their friends. I know in our culture, there’s always fun in that.
Sunlight hits my eyes, for breakfast I only eat fruits. I'm going to the city, just a little fun, my girlfriends give me a boost.
